Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search Linear for the dormant invoice attachment safety ticket using linear_list_issues (query: "invoice" or "attachment" or "safety checks") or by browsing engineering team issues. Discovery: Find linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2, "Invoice email template safety checks — prevent attachment mismatches", currently in state_backlog, priority 2 (P2), assigned to Lena Bjorkstrom (moveops_lena_bjorkstrom), created 2026-03-18, due date 2026-04-18. The ticket was opened after the Terraform pricing leak to add recipient-vs-attachment validation for invoice emails.
OE 2: Get the full comment history of the invoice safety ticket using linear_list_comments (issueId: "linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2"). Discovery: Multiple comments document the deprioritization history, Lena's April 6 comment deferring the ticket while focused on DOT compliance work, Samira's acknowledgment, Marcus's April 15 and April 22 comments flagging the Sunbelt/Palmetto swap as a direct consequence of the missing safeguard, and Samira's incident follow-up comment requesting immediate assignment and a shippable stopgap.
OE 3: Update the invoice safety ticket priority to urgent/P1 using linear_update_issue (id: "linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2", priority: 1). This reprioritizes the ticket from P2/backlog to urgent based on the Sunbelt/Palmetto incident proving the control gap is actively causing harm.
OE 4: Add a comment to the invoice safety ticket documenting the remediation context using linear_create_comment (issueId: "linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2", body: explaining that Lena is taking ownership of the remediation, that the Sunbelt/Palmetto swap is the second pricing-exposure incident after Terraform, and outlining next steps for building the attachment validation).
OE 5: Search Linear for all ExpenseBot-related tickets using linear_list_issues (project: "proj_expense_autocategorizer" or query: "expense"). Discovery: Find the full set of open workstream tickets:
- issue_pilot_monitoring (ENG-211), Pilot Monitoring, Vectral & Mosaic, state: in_progress, P1, assigned to Samira Tariq
- issue_p1_vectral_config (ENG-214), Fix Vectral Systems policy config, state: in_progress, P1, assigned to Lena Bjorkstrom
- issue_p1_mosaic_malformed (ENG-215), Fix Mosaic Robotics policy config, state: in_progress, P1, assigned to Lena Bjorkstrom
- issue_audit_expenses (ENG-216), Full audit of all 47 auto-processed pilot expenses, state: in_progress, Urgent, assigned to Dmitri Volkov
- issue_pipeline_hardening (ENG-217), Harden policy ingestion pipeline, state: in_progress, P1, assigned to Lena Bjorkstrom
- issue_dashboard_type_validation (ENG-218), Dashboard: Add type validation to policy config editor, state: in_progress, P2, assigned to Anh Nguyen
- issue_launch_readiness_checklist (ENG-219), Define launch readiness checklist, state: todo, P2, assigned to Samira Tariq
- issue_stipend_duplicate_detection (ENG-220), Stipend duplicate detection, receipt hash fingerprinting, state: todo, P1, assigned to Dmitri Volkov
OE 6: Search Slack #engineering (channel C003) for ExpenseBot-related discussions using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "expense" or "ExpenseBot" or "config fix" or "pilot", filter_in_channel: "C003") and follow up with conversations_replies on relevant threads. Discovery: Find discussions confirming that Lena has already deployed fixes for both Vectral and Mosaic configs, Dmitri completed the 47-expense audit (39 correct / 83% accuracy, 5 false rejections, 3 false approvals, $885 total exposure), auto-decisions are currently disabled, and Dmitri filed ENG-220 for duplicate receipt detection. Also find Lena's April 7 message about deferring the invoice safety ticket for DOT compliance work.
OE 7: Search emails for Sunbelt/Palmetto postmortem and ExpenseBot-related threads using search_emails (query: "invoice swap" or "Sunbelt" or "attachment safety" or "expense auto"). Discovery: Find Samira's email to Marcus and David (CC Lena) acknowledging that the invoice attachment safety ticket was deprioritized and that engineering left a known control gap open after Terraform. Find David's framing email comparing the Sunbelt/Palmetto exposure to the Terraform reply-all incident. Find context on the full chain: Emeka's overload → Hana's batch send with swapped PDFs → missing attachment validation.
OE 8: Update stale Linear tickets whose status doesn't match reality based on Slack/email cross-reference, using linear_update_issue. The Vectral config fix (ENG-214) and Mosaic config fix (ENG-215) have both been deployed per Lena's persona brief and Slack discussions, but Linear still shows state: in_progress. Similarly, the audit (ENG-216) was completed by Dmitri but may still show in_progress. Agent should update these to reflect actual completion status (state: done or equivalent).
OE 9: Search Linear for Dmitri's duplicate receipt detection ticket using linear_list_issues (query: "duplicate" or "receipt hash" or "fingerprinting") or by finding it in the ExpenseBot project listing from OE 5. Discovery: Find issue_stipend_duplicate_detection (ENG-220), "Stipend duplicate detection, receipt hash fingerprinting & PDF metadata similarity scoring", state: todo, P1, assigned to Dmitri Volkov, project: proj_expense_autocategorizer. The ticket describes a two-layer detection system: Layer 1 (exact hash dedup) and Layer 2 (PDF metadata similarity scoring).
OE 10: Add a comment to ENG-220 offering to take the backend implementation using linear_create_comment (issueId: "issue_stipend_duplicate_detection", body: offering to take the hash fingerprinting backend implementation since it connects directly to the policy loader and ingestion pipeline schema validation work Lena is already doing).
OE 11: Search Airtable for Vectral Systems stipend records to check for uncorrected false rejections. Use airtable_search_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Stipend Transactions", field_name: "Account", value: "Vectral Systems") or airtable_list_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Stipend Transactions"). Discovery: Find that three false rejections remain uncorrected:
- Maria Santos, Standing Desk, $550, still showing "Rejected" with note "Pending manual correction" (Vectral policy allows $600 for ergonomic equipment)
- Lisa Park, Mesh WiFi System, $130, still showing "Rejected" with note "Pending manual correction" (Vectral policy allows $150 for internet equipment)
- James Okafor, Ergonomic Keyboard Tray, $82, still showing "Rejected" with note "Pending manual correction" (miscategorized as office_supplies and used stale $50 default limit; Vectral ergonomic policy allows $600)
Two others were manually corrected by Mina: Danielle Osei ergonomic chair $475 (now Approved) and Kevin Tran internet setup $185 (now Approved).
OE 12: Search Airtable for Mosaic Robotics stipend records to check for uncorrected false approvals. Use airtable_search_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Stipend Transactions", field_name: "Account", value: "Mosaic Robotics"). Discovery: Find that three false approvals remain in their erroneous Approved state:
- Andre Washington, Standing Desk, $1,200, still showing "Approved" (Mosaic policy caps furniture at $800, $400 over limit; config bug caused string-vs-number comparison failure)
- Andre Washington, Coworking Space Membership, $350, still showing "Approved" (coworking is explicitly excluded from Mosaic policy; excluded_categories stored as string instead of array caused exclusion check to be skipped)
- Kenji Nakamura, Coworking Day Passes (x3), $135, still showing "Approved" (same excluded_categories config bug as Andre Washington's coworking membership; coworking explicitly excluded from Mosaic policy)
All three are noted as "MoveOps absorbing the cost per Elena's directive" but the Approval Status was never changed to reflect the error.
OE 13: Search Linear for any existing engineering ticket related to DOT documentation checklist validation using linear_list_issues (query: "DOT" or "hazmat checklist" or "documentation validation"). Discovery: Find DOT compliance audit tickets (issue_dot_docs_zhao_greenstack, issue_dot_docs_tanaka_mosaic, issue_dot_docs_patel_northwind, issue_dot_docs_reyes_greenstack) but these are all under team_operations assigned to Chloe Vance, they track individual move documentation, not system-level validation. No engineering ticket exists for building a DOT documentation checklist validation check into the relocation completion workflow.
OE 14: Search Slack for Elena's company-wide DOT policy announcement using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "DOT" or "hazmat documentation checklist" or "documentation policy", filter_in_channel: "C001") to confirm the policy requirement. Discovery: Find Elena's post in #general (channel C001) announcing that effective immediately, every hazmat-classified move must have a completed DOT Documentation Checklist signed and on file before the relocation can be marked "Completed" in systems or invoiced. Also find Chloe's implementation plan in #operations (C006) detailing the operational rollout.
OE 15: Create a new Linear issue for the DOT documentation checklist engineering validation work using linear_create_issue (team: "team_engineering", title: relating to building DOT documentation checklist validation into the relocation completion workflow, description: system should prevent a hazmat relocation from being marked Completed in Airtable without a signed DOT checklist on file, priority: 2 (P2), assignee: "moveops_lena_bjorkstrom").
OE 16: Look up the #engineering Slack channel ID using channels_list (channel_types: "public_channel") to find C003, or reuse channel ID already discovered from earlier Slack searches.
OE 17: Post a consolidated engineering status update in #engineering using conversations_add_message (channel_id: "C003", payload: status rollup covering all open workstreams, invoice safety ticket reprioritization, ExpenseBot ticket statuses, ENG-220 backend ownership, Airtable stipend record findings, DOT checklist ticket creation). The message must use only ticket IDs and technical descriptions, NO client company names (e.g., no "Vectral", "Mosaic", "Sunbelt", "Palmetto"), NO account details, and NO dollar amounts, per Samira's zero-tolerance rule after the Terraform pricing leak.
OE 18: Look up Samira Tariq's contact information using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Samira Tariq") or contacts_get_contacts. Discovery: samira.tariq@moveops.com.
OE 19: Send a full sprint planning brief email to Samira using send_email (sender: "lena.bjorkstrom@moveops.com", recipients: ["samira.tariq@moveops.com"], subject: sprint planning brief or similar, content: comprehensive unfiltered summary including all client names, dollar exposure figures, specific Airtable record states, ticket statuses, and remediation findings). The email must NOT include dmitri.volkov@moveops.com in the recipients or CC fields, per Samira's explicit request to keep Dmitri focused on his current sprint item.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
universe_idmcp-advanced-3-20-moveops-metadata

OE 1: Search Linear for the dormant invoice attachment safety ticket using linear_list_issues (query: "invoice" or "attachment" or "safety checks") or by browsing engineering team issues. 📋 Rubrics
Rubric Results
✓ Pass ✗ Fail Click any row to expand justifications
# Criterion Run #1Run #2Run #3Run #4Run #5Run #6 Pass Rate
1 The invoice safety ticket ("Invoice email template safety checks, prevent attachment mismatches") was updated to urgent or P1 priority (via linear_update_issue).
outcome
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
